title: All-sided blocks
description: Adds decorative versions of some blocks, with the nicest texture on all sides
body: # All-sided blocks Have you ever looked at the composters bottom texture and thought, what a shame that I can't use this as a crate? Or wanted to use the blast furnace top texture as a trim on your wall? Well, then this mod is for you. It adds a decorative version of many blocks, that has the nicest texture one all sides, so you can use the vanilla textures in ways you haven't ever before. As the vanilla textures are used it is compatible with any resourcepack. ### All added blocks All the blocks are purely decorational, however the wood blocks are flamable. **All blocks can be created with the stonecutter:** You are allowed to use this mod in modpacks. Do link this page from the pack's mod list tho. You are also allowed to use it in videos etc as long as you link to this page.
